title: Freeze Frame: The Camera Mod
description: Adds Cameras to Minecraft in a fresh and intuitive way!
body:
Adds the Camera to Minecraft, in a fresh and intuitive way!

Cameras will store their photos onto Film Roll, which can be printed into Photos at a Developing Table, or renamed/removed by using the Film Roll item!

Photos can also be copied in Developing Tables and placed in Item Frames to display in your home.

You can also place a Tripod by crouching while using the Camera, which can take photos by interacting with it.

Spyglasses and Cameras now also let you adjust zoom levels with the mouse wheel.

[![Use code FROZENBLOCK with Kinetic Hosting for 15% off your first month!](https://i.imgur.com/9ZfqfCq.png)](https://tinyurl.com/3xhmk7fb)
